research_insights.title: Research & Insights
research_insights.subtitle: Research-backed guidance for a safer pregnancy journey

content.hero_subtitle: Understand the purpose, benefits, and safety of prenatal activity

intro_blocks.label: WHY THIS MATTERS
intro_blocks.heading: Making Pregnancy Fitness More Informed
paragraphs: This section helps users understand the purpose, benefits, safety principles, and evidence behind physical activity during pregnancy.
Blooma simplifies research-based guidance into a format that is easy to understand, supportive, and relevant to everyday routines.
The goal is to help users feel more confident, aware, and guided throughout their prenatal wellness journey.

items.title: Research-Based Guidance
items.description: Built on trusted medical and prenatal fitness recommendations.

items.title: Blooma Integration
items.description: Insights connect with activity planning and safety guidance.

content.hero_subtitle: Guided by safety, clarity, and research

intro_blocks.label: CONTENT PRINCIPLES
intro_blocks.heading: Designed for Safety and Clarity
paragraphs: Blooma’s research content follows a structured approach to ensure that guidance remains safe, relevant, and easy to understand.
Each insight is designed to balance medical awareness with user-friendly explanation so that information feels supportive rather than overwhelming.

items.title: Evidence-backed
items.description: Based on trusted medical and public health sources.

items.title: Safety-first
items.description: Clear warnings and precautions are always included.

items.title: Simple Language
items.description: Clear and calm explanations for everyday use.

content.hero_subtitle: Different types of educational content available

intro_blocks.label: CONTENT OVERVIEW
intro_blocks.heading: What This Section Includes
paragraphs: Blooma organizes research and educational content into multiple categories so users can easily explore what matters most to them.
This includes weekly insights, trimester-based guidance, safety reminders, and condition-specific notes to support different needs during pregnancy.

items.title: Weekly Insights
items.description: Content aligned with your pregnancy week.

items.title: Trimester Guidance
items.description: How movement and needs evolve over time.

items.title: Safety & Warning Signs
items.description: When to stop and seek medical advice.

content.hero_subtitle: Understanding the benefits of prenatal activity

intro_blocks.label: BENEFITS
intro_blocks.heading: Supporting Physical and Emotional Well-being
paragraphs: Safe and guided movement during pregnancy may support overall comfort, mobility, energy levels, and emotional balance.
Blooma presents these benefits in a structured way so users can understand how simple activities contribute to daily well-being.

items.title: Better Energy
items.description: Helps reduce fatigue and improve stamina.

intro_blocks.label: SAFETY GUIDANCE
intro_blocks.heading: Moving with Awareness
paragraphs: Safety is a key part of prenatal fitness. Blooma highlights simple but important reminders to help users stay within comfortable and safe limits.
Users are encouraged to listen to their body, move at a manageable pace, and avoid pushing beyond comfort.

intro_blocks.label: TRIMESTER SUPPORT
intro_blocks.heading: Adapting Over Time
paragraphs: As pregnancy progresses, the body changes and movement needs evolve.
Blooma organizes guidance by trimester so users can better understand how to adapt activity safely.

intro_blocks.label: PERSONALIZATION
intro_blocks.heading: Making Insights More Relevant
paragraphs: Blooma uses selected user inputs to make insights more relevant and meaningful.
This helps ensure that guidance reflects your stage, preferences, and overall activity context.

content.hero_subtitle: Not a substitute for medical advice

intro_blocks.label: IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER
intro_blocks.heading: Use Guidance Responsibly
paragraphs: Blooma’s Research & Insights section is designed for educational and wellness support purposes only.
It does not diagnose, treat, or replace professional medical advice.
Users should consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting or changing any activity during pregnancy.

items.title: Consult a Professional
items.description: Always seek medical guidance when needed.
